# DSA — Second Brain

> A machine-readable memory system over this project's knowledge base.
> This file maps the corpus for LLMs and AI agents.
> Full index: `.second-brain/manifest.json`.

## DSA-Grandmaster-Codex

- [00-PHILOSOPHY-AND-DOCTRINE](DSA-Grandmaster-Codex/00-PHILOSOPHY-AND-DOCTRINE/00-Index.md): Before any algorithm. Before any data structure. Before any line of code — the **mindset**
- [01-LEVELS-PROGRESSION](DSA-Grandmaster-Codex/01-LEVELS-PROGRESSION/00-Index.md): This folder defines the **complete progression** from absolute zero (Level 0) to algorithm

- [07-NODEJS-EXPRESS](FULLSTACK-AI-GRANDMASTER-CODEX/07-NODEJS-EXPRESS/00-Index.md): You write `.js` (or `.ts`) source files; Node executes them. You need **Node** itself, npm
- [08-SQL-DATABASES](FULLSTACK-AI-GRANDMASTER-CODEX/08-SQL-DATABASES/00-Index.md): You need a server (the database itself) and a client (something that sends SQL to it).
- [09-NOSQL-MONGODB](FULLSTACK-AI-GRANDMASTER-CODEX/09-NOSQL-MONGODB/00-Index.md): You write queries in **mongosh** (the shell) or in your app (via a driver / Mongoose). Beh

## Second Brain tooling

- [Manifest](.second-brain/manifest.json): full inventory of all docs
- [Knowledge graph](.second-brain/graph/knowledge-graph.json): nodes + edges
- [Outline](.second-brain/outline.md): every heading in the corpus
- [Glossary](.second-brain/glossary.md): concept → defining docs
- [Brain CLI](.second-brain/brain.py): offline search/related/outline
